lobster.t:
Every {1}m, {2}% chance a nearby plant becomes molten.
Every {3}m, {4}% chance a nearby plant becomes Meteoric.

rainbowlobster.t:
Every {1}m, {2}% chance a nearby plant becomes molten.
Every {3}m, {4}% chance a nearby plant becomes Meteoric.

kiwi.t: Every {1}s, goes to the egg with the highest hatch time and reduces its hatch time by {2}s.

bloodkiwi.t: Every {1}s, goes to the egg with the highest hatch time and reduces its hatch time by {2}s. Increase egg hatchspeed by {3}%.

mimic.t: Every {1}m, Mimics and copies an ability from another pet and performs its ability.

capybara.t: All pets within {1} studs won't lose hunger and will gain {2} XP every second!

sloth.t: Every {1}m, goes to a nearby fruit and does-a-cooking! Applying Pasta, Sauce or Meatball mutation!

dilo.t: Every {1}m, Opens its frills and spits out venom! The venom spreads to {2} other random pets, advancing cooldowns by {3}s OR granting {4} XP!

rainbowdilo.t: Every {1}m, Opens its frills and spits out venom! The venom spreads to {2} other random pets, advancing cooldowns by {3}s OR granting {4} XP!

peacock.t: Every {1}m, Fans its feathers and all active pets within {2} studs will advance cooldowns for their abilities by {3}s.

albinopeacock.t: Every {1}m, fans its feathers and all active pets within {2} studs will advance cooldown for their abilities by {3}s and advance xp by half the amount!

mooncat.t: Every {1}s, naps for {2}s, new fruit within {2} studs will be {3}x Larger! {4}% Chance Night Type fruit stays after harvest.

seaturtle.t:
Every {1}m, Shares its wisdom with a random pet, granting {2} bonus experience!
Every {3}s, splashes water at a nearby fruit and it has a {4}% chance to become wet!

frog.t: Every {1}m, Croaks and a random nearby plant will advance growth by 24h.

echofrog.t: Every {1}m, Croaks and a random nearby plant will advance growth by 24h.

treefrog.t: Every {1}m, advances the growth of a random plant by 15 minutes.

brontosaurus.t: Pets hatched from eggs have a {1}% increase in base size and weight! (Cap 30%)

queenbee.t:
Every {1}m, a nearby fruit gets magically pollinated, applying Pollinated mutation!
Every {2}m, the pet with the highest cooldown refreshes its ability!

starfish.t: Gain an additional {1} XP Per second.

spinosaurus.t: Every {1}m, devours a random mutation from {2} fruits in your garden each, then roars, spreading those mutations to 1 random fruit in your garden! Prioritizes applying mutations to a favorited fruit.

rainbowspinosaurus.t: Every {1}m, devours a random mutation from {2} fruits in your garden each, then roars, spreading those mutations to 1 random fruit in your garden! Prioritizes applying mutations to a favorited fruit.

ckitsune.t: Every {1}m, Launches cursed energy at 9 different fruit, each fruit has a {2}% chance to mutate with CorruptChakra with a very rare chance for Corrupt Foxfire Chakra instead.

rainbowckitsune.t: Every {1}m, Launches cursed energy at 9 different fruit, each fruit has a {2}% chance to mutate with CorruptChakra with a very rare chance for Corrupt Foxfire Chakra instead.

kitsune.t: Every {1}m, goes to another player's crop, mutates it with Chakra then steals (duplicate) and gives it to you! Very rare chance to mutate with Foxfire Chakra mutation instead!

frenchfryferret.t: Every {1}m, Increase a random pets level by 1! Ability cannot be mimicked or refreshed.

goldengoose.t: Every {1}m, Lays a Golden Egg plant that starts with the Fortune mutation.

seal.t: When selling pets, has a {1}% chance to get the pet back as its egg equivalent. (Cap 50%)

koi.t: When hatching eggs, there is a {1}% chance to get the egg back. (Cap 16%)

wasp.t:
Every {1}m, flies to a nearby fruit and pollinates it, applying Pollinated mutation.
Every {2}m, stings a random pet and advances its ability cooldown by {3}s.

peachwasp.t:
Every {1}m, flies to a nearby fruit and Plasmafies it, applying Plasma mutation!
Every {2}m, stings a random pet and advances its ability cooldown by {3}s!

tarantulahawk.t:
Every {1}m, flies to a nearby fruit and pollinates it, applying Pollinated mutation!
Every {2}m, stings a random pet and advances its ability cooldown by {3}s.

bee.t: Every {1}m, flies to a nearby fruit and pollinates it, applying Pollinated mutation!

honeybee.t: Every {1}m, flies to a nearby fruit and pollinates it, applying Pollinated mutation!

petalbee.t:
Every {1}m, flies to a nearby fruit and pollinates it, applying Pollinated mutation.
{2}% chance Flower type fruit stays after harvest.

packbee.t:
Every {1}m, flies to a nearby fruit and pollinates it, applying Pollinated mutation!
Increases player backpack size by {2}.

discobee.t: Every {1}m, {2}% chance a nearby fruit becomes Disco!

nightowl.t: All active pets gain an additional {1} XP per second.

owl.t: All active pets gain an additional {1} XP per second.

bloodowl.t: All active pets gain an additional {1} XP per second.

brownowl.t: All active pets gain an additional {1} XP per second.

rainbowbrownowl.t: All active pets gain an additional {1} XP per second.

cookedowl.t:
Every {1}m, {2}% chance to cook a nearby fruit, Usually Burnt, but occasionally Cooked!
All active pets gain an additional {3} XP/s! Also very tasty!

orangetabby.t: Every {1}s, naps for {2}s, New fruit within {2} studs will be {3}x larger!

butterfly.t: Every {1}m, flies to a nearby fruit with 5+ mutations, removes all mutations from it and turns it Rainbow! Ignores favorited fruit.

trex.t: Every {1}m, devours a random mutation from your garden, then roars, spreading that mutation to {2} other random fruits in your garden!

mole.t: Every {1}s, Digs down underground to find treasure. Can dig up gear or sheckles.

pancakemole.t: Every {1}s, Digs down underground to find treasure. Can dig up gear or sheckles.

golem.t: Every {1}m, goes to the mutation machine and tinkers with it to advance its time by {2}s!

dragonfly.t: Every {1}m, turns one random fruit gold!

silverdragonfly.t: Every {1}m, turns one random fruit Silver!

giantsilverdragonfly.t: Every {1}m, turns one random fruit Silver!

diamonddragonfly.t: Every {1}m, turns one random fruit Diamond!

triceratops.t: Every 3:33m, rams into 3 random plants and advances their growth by 33:33m. Has a {1}% chance to do it again each time.

chickenzombie.t:
Every {1}m, {2}% chance a nearby fruit becomes Zombified!
Increase egg hatch speed by {3}%.

raptor.t:
{1}% chance fruit gets Amber mutation after collecting! Rarer plants have lesser chance.
Grants additional {2}% increase to player movement speed!

redfox.t: Every {1}m, Goes to another players random crop tries to get a seed from it and gives it to you.

meerkat.t: Every {1}m, goes to another pet and does a lookout. That pet advances cooldown by {2}s! Has a {3}% chance to do it again after each lookout.

fennecfox.t: Every {1}m, goes to another player's random fruit, has a {2}% chance to copy 1 random mutation and apply it to a random fruit you own!

kappa.t: Every {1}m, sprays water on all fruits within {2} studs applying Wet mutation. Has a {3}% chance to replace wet mutations already on fruit with Bloodlit!

spriggan.t: Every {1}m, spreads its roots and all fruit within {2} studs have a {3}% chance to get the Bloom Mutation.

darkspriggan.t: Every {1}m, spreads its roots and nearest {2} fruit within {3} studs have a {4}% to get the Blight mutation!

baldeagle.t: Every 7:04m, takes flight and spreads its wings. All eggs advanced their hatch time by 70.4s! There's a 70.4% chance for the time advance to be multiplied by {1}x.

gorillachef.t: As long as you have a Cooking Pot or Cooking Cauldron in your garden: Grants {1}% to duplicate food on cook!

raccoon.t: Every {1}m, goes to another player's plot and steals (duplicate) a random crop and gives it to you.

ostrich.t: Pets hatched from eggs have a bonus 1 - {1} age to their age value!

hotdog.t: Every {1}m, drops a {2} stud mustard or ketchup puddle that lasts {3} seconds. Pets on mustard have their cooldowns tick by {4}x faster and pets on ketchup gain {5}% more experience!

rainbowhotdog.t: Every {1}m, drops a {2} stud mustard or ketchup puddle that lasts {3} seconds. Pets on mustard have their cooldowns tick by {4}x faster and pets on ketchup gain {5}% more experience!

greenbean.t: Every {1}m, sacrifices a random Beanstalk fruit in your garden to instantly grow a random plant with {2}x Fruit size bonus!

lemonlion.t:
Every 5:00m, Roars whilst applying the Brainrot mutation to a random fruit!
Every {1}m, roars and infuses a random pet with citrus, granting {2} bonus experience!

iguanodon.t: All active dinosaur type pets gain an additional {1} XP per second!

rainbowiguanodon.t: All active dinosaur type pets gain an additional {1} XP per second!

applegazelle.t: Fruits that have Apple in the name have a {1}% chance to duplicate when collected. Harvesting sugar apple crops have a {2}% chance to apply warped mutation to a random fruit in your garden!

squirrel.t: {1}% chance to not consume a use when using the reclaimer! Gains an additional {2} XP per second!

shibainu.t: Every {1}s, {2}% chance to dig up a random seed!

snail.t: {1}% extra chance harvested plants drop seeds. (Cap 10%)

tsuchinoko.t: {1}% extra chance harvested plants drop seeds. (Cap 30%)

tanuki.t: Every {1}m, causes mischief, doing random different actions in your garden!

orangutan.t: When crafting, each material used in the recipe has a {1}% chance to not get consumed! (Cap 7%)

pachycephalo.t: Grants a {1}% chance to duplicate a crafted item! (Cap 25%)

rainbowpachycephalo.t: Grants a {1}% chance to duplicate a crafted item! (Cap 50%)

goldenlab.t: Every {1}s, {2}% chance to dig up a random Seed shop seed.

dog.t: Every {1}s, {2}% chance to dig up a random seed!

flamingo.t: Every {1}m, stands on one leg for {2}s. All plants and fruits within {3} studs will grow {4}x faster!

ant.t:
{1}% chance harvested fruit duplicates! Rarer crops have lower chance.
{2}% extra chance for Candy type fruit to duplicate!

giantant.t:
{1}% chance harvested fruit duplicates!
{2}% extra chance for Candy type fruit to duplicate!

redgiantant.t:
{1}% chance harvested fruit duplicates! (Cap 30%)
{2}% extra chance for Fruit type fruit to duplicate! (Cap 25%)

toucan.t:
Grants all tropical plants within {1} studs, a {2}x size bonus!
Grants all tropical plants within {3} studs, a {4}x variant chance bonus!

moth.t: Every {1}m, Sings to a random pet and restores its hunger by 100%!

crab.t: Every {1}m, goes to another random player and pinches them for {2} - {3} sheckles. Pinched player does not lose sheckles.

cockatrice.t:
Every {1}m, screeches and all fruits within {2} studs have a {3}% chance to turn Silver; {4}% chance to turn gold!
Every {5}m, spits at {6} different fruits/eggs/plants/pets.
Fruits get Toxic mutation, eggs advance by {7} seconds, pets gain {8} XP.

imp.t: Every 6:66m, the Imp will playfully invite you to chase it. Catching the imp will grant a random reward! The imp has a {1}% to play again on successful chase!

pixie.t: Every {1}m, spreads pixie dust for {2}s. All plants within {3} studs will advance growth by an extra 30 seconds every second! Also makes nearby players levitate.

pterodactyl.t:
Every {1}m, flaps its wings and sends out ripples of wind, causing {2} random fruit to get Windstruck, with a {3}% chance for Twisted to be applied as well!
Grants additional {4}% Increase to player jump height!

hamster.t: Every {1}m, runs in a hamster wheel and boosts crafting speed by {2}% for {3}s!

griffin.t: Every {1}m, flaunts its wings and releases a Cyclone. Pets struck have cooldown advanced by {2}s and fruits struck have a {3}% chance to get the Cyclonic mutation!

rainbowgriffin.t: Every {1}m, flaunts its wings and releases 2 Cyclones. Pets struck have cooldown advanced by {2}s and fruits struck have a {3}% chance to get the Cyclonic mutation!

raiju.t: Every {1}m, devours a fruit with Shocked mutation for 1.5x sheckle value to summon a chain of lightning to mutate {2} fruits with Static! During a thunderstorm: {3}% chance for Shocked instead!

cat.t: Every {1}s, naps for {2}s, New fruit within {3} studs will be {4}x larger!

phoenix.t:
Pets taken from the pet mutation machine have a bonus 1 - {1} age to their age value!
Every {2}m, travels between {3} random fruit in your garden which get the Flaming mutation! Fruits passed have {4}% chance to be mutated as well!

rainbowphoenix.t:
Pets taken from the pet mutation machine have a bonus 2 - {1} age to their age value!
Every {2}m, travels between {3} random fruit in your garden which get the Flaming mutation! Fruits passed have {4}% chance to be mutated as well!

tanchozuru.t: Every {1}m, meditates for {2}s, nearby fruits in a {3} studs have a {4}% chance every second to mutate into Tranquil!

wisp.t: As long as you have a Wisp Well in your garden: Grants all pets an additional bonus {1} XP per second. (Cap 6.5)

glimmeringsprite.t: Every {1}m, flies to a nearby fruit and enchants it, applying Glimmering mutation!

luminoussprite.t: Every {1}m, flies to a nearby fruit and enchants it, applying Luminous mutation!

seedling.t: Every {1}m, swaps mutations between two different random fruits. Ignores favorited fruit.

sandsnake.t: Buying from the seed/gear shop has a {1}% chance to duplicate the bought item! (Cap 6%)

drake.t: Goes to any active Cooking Kit and breathes fire on it, boosting cooking speed by {1}%! (Cap 20%)

otter.t: Every {1}s, sprays water on a nearby plant.

polarbear.t: Every {1}s, {2}% chance a nearby fruit becomes Chilled or Frozen.

swan.t:
Every {1}m, Goes to another players pet and befriends it and performs its ability.
Every {2}m, graces a fruit with Graceful mutation!

giantswan.t:
Every {1}m, Goes to another players pet and befriends it and performs its ability.
Every {2}m, graces a fruit with Graceful mutation!

greymouse.t:
Every {1}m, gains an additional {2} bonus experience!
Grants additional {3}% increase to player movement speed!

brownmouse.t:
Every {1}m, gains additional {2} bonus experience!
Grants additional {3}% increase to player jump height!

marmot.t: Every {1}m, burrows down in the ground and hides in a random mound! Finding the marmot will grant a Fall related reward! Has a {2}% chance to burrow again!

chipmunk.t: {1}% chance to not consume a use when using a Harvest tool! (Cap 12%)

sugarglider.t: Every {1}m, glides from 3 different fruits. Copies 1 mutation from each fruit and applies it to the next.

redsquirrel.t: When Fall type pets finish their abilities, they start their cooldown with {1} seconds less! (Cap 30s)

spacesquirrel.t: Every {1}m, has {2}% chance to apply the Voidtouched mutation!

barnowl.t:
Pets bought directly from shops have a bonus 0.1 - {1} KG to their base weight! (Max 3 KG)
All active Fall type pets gain an additional {2} XP/s!

giantbarnowl.t:
Pets bought directly from shops have a bonus 0.1 - {1} KG to their base weight! (Max 3 KG)
All active Fall type pets gain an additional {2} XP/s!

grizzlybear.t:
Every {1}m, {2}% chance a nearby fruit gets the Fall mutation!
Grants {3}% increased player size!

giantgrizzlybear.t:
Every {1}m, {2}% chance a nearby fruit gets the Fall mutation! (Cap 32%)
Grants {3}% increased player size! (Cap 32%)

bunny.t: Every {1}s, eats a carrot for {2}x value bonus!

blackbunny.t: Every {1}s, eats a carrot for {2}x value bonus!

bagelbunny.t: Every {1}s, eats a carrot for {2}x value bonus!

scarletmacaw.t: Every {1}m, {2}% chance to mutate a nearby fruit, applying the Verdant mutation!

shroomie.t: All nearby plants within {1} studs will have increased {2}x size bonus for every Fungus type plant planted in your garden! (Max 300)

rainbowshroomie.t: All nearby plants within {1} studs will have increased {2}x size bonus for every Fungus type plant planted in your garden! (Max 300)

gnome.t: Every {1}m, has a {2}% chance to mutate a random fruit with the Gnomed mutation. Gains an additional 1% chance for every Gnome cosmetic in your garden. (Cap 3%)

ladybug.t: All flower type plants grow {1}x faster. (Cap 4x)

panda.t: Every {1}m, Eats bamboo for {2}x value bonus! (Cap 3x)

jackalope.t: Every {1}s, thumps its feet and has a {2}% chance to mutate a nearby fruit, applying the Sandy mutation. (Cap 100%)

badger.t: Every {1}m, digs around for {2}s, displacing the ground. Nearby fruits within {3} studs have a {4}% chance every second to get Cracked mutation!

giantbadger.t: Every {1}m, digs around for {2}s, displacing the ground. Nearby fruits within {3} studs have a {4}% chance every second to get Cracked mutation!

silvermonkey.t: {1}% chance to refund fruit back to your inventory. (Cap 100%)

monkey.t: {1}% chance to refund fruit back to your inventory. (Cap 100%)

dairycow.t: All plants within {1} studs grow {2}x faster!

prayingmantis.t: Every {1}s, prays for {2}s granting {3}x variant chance within {4} studs!

redpanda.t: Every {1}m, goes to the Gear, Seed or Pet Shop and restocks 1 random stock. Rarer items have rarer chance to stock. Cannot be mimicked or refreshed.

mallard.t: Flies south for the winter every half hour in a day, leaving you with a random reward before returning to your inventory.

salmon.t: For every other Salmon in your garden gains an additional {1} XP per second! (Cap 8)

woodpecker.t: Every {1}m, goes to a Woody type plant and pecks at it for {2} seconds, which grants {3}% chance for Woody type fruit to duplicate! (Cap 8%)

hedgehog.t: Grants prickly plants in {1} studs a {2}x size bonus! (Cap 3.2x)

cardinal.t: All Magical type plants grow {1}x Faster! (Cap 4x)

hummingbird.t: Every {1}s, converts a random single-harvest plant into its seed equivalent. Ignores favorited plants.

tiger.t:
Every {1}m, the Tiger roars, calls all pets in your garden to move toward it. {2} total XP is shared across each pet (max 800 XP per pet).
Every {3}m, roars and {4} random mutations from your garden will be replaced with another random mutation.

whitetiger.t:
Every {1}m, the Tiger roars, calls all pets in your garden to move toward it. {2} total XP is shared (max 800 XP per pet).
Every {3}m, roars and {4} random mutations from your garden will be replaced with another random mutation.

iguana.t: Every {1}s, goes to a random fruit with Frozen mutation and melts it back to Chilled or Wet. Ignores favorited fruit.

chimpanzee.t: Every {1}m, grabs a random fruit from your garden and goes to the sell stall and sells it for you. There is a {2}% chance the fruit does not get collected.

firefly.t: Every {1}s, {2}% chance a nearby fruit becomes Shocked!

giantfirefly.t: Every {1}s, {2}% chance a nearby fruit becomes Shocked!

mizuchi.t:
When selling fruits with Azure mutation: There is a {1}% chance a random mutation from that fruit will be applied to a fruit in your garden!
Every {2}m, {3}% chance a nearby fruit becomes Azure!

rainbowmizuchi.t:
When selling fruits with Azure mutation: There is a {1}% chance a random mutation from that fruit will be applied to a fruit in your garden!
Every {2}m, {3}% chance a nearby fruit becomes Azure!

parasaurolophus.t: Every {1}s, goes to the cosmetic crate with the highest open time, and reduces its open time by {2}s! There is a {3}% chance for open time reduction to be multiplied by {4}x.

hyrax.t: Every {1}m, consumes a random fruit in your garden and converts it into a Fissure Berry seed! Ignores favorited fruit!

fortunesquirrel.t: Every {1}m, has {2}% chance to apply the Jackpot mutation! (Cap 34%)

chubbychipmunk.t:
Every {1}m, eats a fruit in your garden and gains {2} KG weight! (Ignores favorited or single-harvest fruits)
After eating, an Acorn will spawn somewhere! Collecting it grants a random reward!

idolchipmunk.t: Every {1}m, performs a song for {2}s and all other pets in your garden restore {3}% hunger per second!

farmerchipmunk.t: All Nut type plants grow {1}x faster! (Cap 4x)

chinchilla.t: Every {1}m, goes to another pet, rolls around in dust and makes that pet perform its ability {2} times in a row!

rainbowchinchilla.t: Every {1}m, goes to another pet, rolls around in dust and makes that pet perform its ability {2} times in a row!

bat.t: Grants Spooky plants in {1} studs a {2}x variant chance bonus! (Cap 1.5x)

ghostlybat.t: Grants Spooky plants in {1} studs a {2}x variant chance bonus! (Cap 3.4x)

bonedog.t: Every {1}s, {2}% chance to dig up a random seed!

ghostlybonedog.t: Every {1}s, {2}% chance to dig up a random seed!

spider.t: Every {1}m, weaves a {2} stud web that lasts for {3}s. Pets on the web advance cooldown an extra {4}s every second & plants grow an additional {5}s every second!

ghostlyspider.t: Every {1}m, weaves a 40 stud web that lasts for {2}s. Pets on the web advance cooldown an extra {3}s every second & plants grow an additional {4}s every second!

wolf.t: Every {1}m, howls: Fruits in {2} studs have a {3}% get Moonlit mutation and turns you into a Werewolf for {4}s! Granting bonus {5}% movement speed & {6}% jump height!

blackcat.t: Every {1}m, goes to a Witch's Cauldron cosmetic and naps near it for {2}s. New fruit within {3} studs will be {4}x larger.

ghostlyblackcat.t: Every {1}m, goes to a Witch's Cauldron cosmetic and naps near it for {2}s. New fruit within {3} studs will be {4}x larger.

headlesshorseman.t: Every {1}m, haunts a random level {2} pet without a mutation, resetting it to level 1 and bestowing one of four chaotic mutations: Dreadbound, Soulflame, or Spectral — with a rare {3}% chance for Nightmare!

pumpkinrat.t: Every {1}m, converts a pumpkin into a random Jack-O-Lantern cosmetic! Collect all 5 variants!

ghostbear.t: Every {1}m, goes to a nearby fruit and scares it! Applies the Spooky mutation!

reaper.t: Every {1}m, sacrifices 4 fruit in your garden to apply a medium Passive boost or medium XP Boost to a random pet in your garden!

ankylosaurus.t: When another player steals fruit from you, grants a {1}% chance you get the stolen fruit as well! (Cap 35%)

rainbowankylosaurus.t: When another player steals fruit from you, grants a {1}% chance you get the stolen fruit as well! (Cap 60%)

crow.t: Spooky type plants within {1} studs have {2}x increased growth speed!

goblin.t: Every {1}m, goes to another random player and carries them and brings them to you! Player can jump to be released!

hexserpent.t: You must plant 5 single-harvest plants in a Hex Circle cosmetic and every {1}m: The Hex Serpent will perform a ritual, consuming the plants, granting random rewards!

goat.t: Every {1}m, goes to a random player and rams them, knocking and launching them away!

lich.t:
Spooky type plants within {1} studs have increased {2}x variant chance, {3}x growth speed and {4}x size bonus!
All active Halloween type pets gain an additional {5} XP/s!

scarab.t: Spooky type plants within {1} studs have {2}x increased growth size!

ghostlyscarab.t: Spooky type plants within {1} studs have {2}x increased growth size!

mummy.t: Pets you get from chests have a bonus 0.1 - {1} KG to their base weight! (Max 3.5 KG).

ghostlymummy.t: Pets you get from chests have a bonus 0.1 - {1} KG to their base weight! (Max 3.5 KG).

tombmarmot.t: Every {1}m, digs down and hides in a random Tombstone. Going to the tombstone awards a random Graveyard cosmetic!

ghostlytombmarmot.t: Every {1}m, digs down and hides in a random Tombstone. Going to the tombstone awards a random Graveyard cosmetic!

glasscat.t:
Every {1}s, naps for {2}s. New fruit within {2} studs will be {3}x larger!
Every {4}s, polishes a nearby fruit and it has a {5}% chance to become Glossy!

glassdog.t:
Every {1}s, {2}% chance to dig up a random seed!
Every {3}s, polishes a nearby fruit and it has a {4}% chance to become Glossy!

woody.t: Every {1}m, goes to nearby fruit and dances, applying Leeched mutation!

oxpecker.t: When Safari type pets finish their abilities, they start their cooldown with {1} seconds less! (Cap 30s)

rainbowoxpecker.t: When Safari type pets finish their abilities, they start their cooldown with {1} seconds less! (Cap 50s)

zebra.t: Every 30m on the clock, All Zebras stampede back and forth from the Seed Shop to Gear Shop or vice-versa, and grants you a random Safari related reward! Has {1}% chance to trigger again on each stampede! (Cap 20%)

rainbowzebra.t: Every 30m on the clock, All Zebras stampede back and forth, and grants you a random Safari related reward! Has {1}% chance to trigger again! (Cap 40%)

giraffe.t: Every {1}m, eats fruit that are at least 10 studs high for {2}x sell value. The plant the fruit came from advances growth by {3}m! Also applies Arid mutation to all other fruits on that plant.

rainbowgiraffe.t: Every {1}m, eats fruit that are at least 10 studs high for {2}x sell value. The plant the fruit came from advances growth by {3}m! Also applies Arid mutation to all other fruits on that plant.

rhino.t: Every {1}m, charges into a random egg or random fruit in your garden: Rammed eggs have hatch time halved, rammed fruits get Mirage mutation!

rainbowrhino.t: Every {1}m, charges into a random egg or random fruit in your garden: Rammed eggs have hatch time halved, rammed fruits get Mirage mutation!

elephant.t: Every {1}m, blesses an age {2} pet, resetting its age back to 1, increasing its base weight by 0.1 KG if its base weight is less than {3} KG! Cannot bless other Elephants.

rainbowelephant.t: Every {1}m, blesses an age {2} pet, resetting its age back to 1, increasing its base weight by 0.1 KG if its base weight is less than {3} KG! Cannot bless other Elephants.

hydra.t:
Every {1}m, ages itself up by 1, hatches an egg and applies Terran mutation. Cannot be mimicked or refreshed!
When selling fruits with Terran mutation: There is a {2}% chance a random mutation from that fruit will be applied to a fruit in your garden!

rainbowhydra.t:
Every {1}m, ages itself up by 1, hatches an egg and applies Terran mutation. Cannot be mimicked or refreshed!
When selling fruits with Terran mutation: There is a {2}% chance a random mutation from that fruit will be applied to a fruit in your garden!

specter.t: Every {1}m, haunts a random fruit and has {2}% chance to mutate it with Vamp, or rare chance for Spooky or even rarer chance for Ghostly instead!

bearbee.t: Every {1}m, goes to a nearby fruit and tries to pollinate it, but its not a bee so it fails and turns it to Honey Glazed instead :(

mochimouse.t:
All active Food type pets gain an additional {1} XP/s!
Every {2}m, gains additional {3} bonus experience!

stegosaurus.t:
{1}% chance harvested fruit duplicates! Rarer crops have lower chance.
{2}% extra chance for Prehistoric type fruit to duplicate!

mantisshrimp.t: Every {1}m, punches different things in your garden for different effects!

giantmantisshrimp.t: Every {1}m, punches different things in your garden for different effects!

stagbeetle.t: Every {1}m, initiates a battle with another player's Beetle.

rainbowstagbeetle.t: Every {1}m, initiates a battle with another player's Beetle.

amethystbeetle.t: Every {1}m, initiates a battle with another player's Beetle.

axolotl.t: {1}% chance Summer type fruit stays after collecting! (Cap 13%)

armadillo.t: Every {1}m, rolls into a ball and transforms you into an armadillo ball for {2}s!

giantarmadillo.t: Every {1}m, rolls into a ball and transforms you into an armadillo ball for {2}s!

gecko.t: Safari type plants within {1} studs have {2}x increased variant chance!

hyena.t: Gains an additional {1} XP/s for every Hyena in your garden! (Cap 8)

capebuffalo.t:
{1}% chance harvested fruit duplicates! (Cap 20%)
{2}% extra chance for Safari type fruit to duplicate! (Cap 15%)

crocodile.t: Every {1}m, bites on to a random Plant or Pet for {2}s and performs a roll. Plants grow an additional {3}s/s and Pets get additional {4} XP/s.

lion.t:
Every {1}m, roars, calls pets in your garden to move toward it. {2} total cooldown advancement is shared across each pet (max {3}s per pet).
Every {4}m, roars and mutates fruit up to the number of Safari type pets you have in your garden with a random Safari Mutation!

lioness.t:
Every {1}m, roars, calls pets in your garden to move toward it. {2} total cooldown advancement is shared across each pet (max {3}s per pet).
Every {4}m, roars and mutates fruit up to the number of Safari type pets you have in your garden with a random Safari Mutation!

hippo.t:
Every {1}m, eats a Watermelon for {2}x value bonus and has a {3}% to recover the Watermelon seed!
Every {4}m, goes to a nearby fruit and applies Monsoon mutation!

diamondpanther.t: When harvesting a fruit with 12 or more mutations: {1}% chance for random pet to age up by 1! (Cap 6%)

rubysquid.t: Continuously copies a random pet's passive (non-cooldown based).

smithingdog.t: Every {1}m, {2}% chance to dig up coal! (Cap 20%)

topazsnail.t: When triggering a Lucky Harvest: {1}% you get a Cleansing Pet Shard! (Max 50%)

emeraldsnake.t: Every {1}m, goes to a random fruit and converts it into a random Gem-themed cosmetic!

termite.t: Every {1}m, eats from and reduces a random pet's level by 1.

geodeturtle.t: Every {1}m, converts an Advanced Sprinkler into a Geode Sprinkler which applies Geode mutation!

trapdoorspider.t: Every {1}s, eats a random fruit in your garden and all fruits within a {2} stud range has a {3}% chance to mutate with the Webbed Mutation!

goblinminer.t: Every 5 minutes on the clock has a {1}% chance to grant a dig! (Cap 5%)

cheetah.t: Every {1}m, turns you into a cheetah for {2}s! Harvested fruit during this time have a {3}% chance to get the Wildfast mutation! (Cap 30%)

sapphiremacaw.t: Every {1}m, {2}% chance to mutate a nearby fruit, applying the Crystalized mutation! (Cap 100%)

hyacinthmacaw.t: Every {1}m, {2}% chance to mutate a nearby fruit, applying the Cloudtouched mutation! (Cap 100%)

deer.t: {1}% chance berry fruit stays after collecting! (Cap 5%)

spotteddeer.t: {1}% chance berry fruit stays after collecting! (Cap 10%)

elk.t: {1}% chance berry fruit stays after collecting! (Cap 5%)

rainbowelk.t: {1}% chance berry fruit stays after collecting! (Cap 10%)

sushibear.t:
Every {1}s, {2}% chance a nearby fruit becomes Chilled or Frozen.
Every {3}m, flings sushi towards a random pet and feeds it for {4}% of its hunger.

magpie.t: When selling silver fruit, it has a {1}% chance to grant a random reward! (Max 30%)

rainbowmagpie.t: When selling silver fruit, it has a {1}% chance to grant a random reward! (Max 30%)

pig.t: Every {1}s, emits an aura for {2}s granting {3}x chance for new fruit to grow as variants within {4} studs!

baconpig.t: Every {1}s, emits an aura for {2}s granting {3}x chance for new fruit to grow as variants within {4} studs!

silverpiggy.t: All nearby plants within {1} studs will gain additional {2} SEC/s growth speed for every Silver Ingot Cosmetic in your garden!

goldenpiggy.t: All nearby pets within {1} studs will gain additional {2} XP/s for every Gold Ingot Cosmetic in your garden!

packmule.t: Crafted pets have a bonus 0.1 - {1} KG to their base weight! (Max 3 KG).

beardeddragon.t: Every {1}m, consumes all fruit on a plant (at least 3) that is Divine rarity and above: Grants a random egg from the egg shop! Ignores plants with favorited fruit.

rainbowbeardeddragon.t: Every {1}m, consumes all fruit on a plant (at least 3) that is Divine rarity and above: Grants a random egg from the egg shop! Ignores plants with favorited fruit.

chimera.t:
Every {1}m, roars and {2} total cooldown advancement is shared across each pet (max {3}s per pet).
Every {4}m, rams a random player, knocking them away but gives them a Common Egg!
Buying from the seed/gear shop has a {5}% chance to duplicate the bought item.

clam.t: When using watering cans, there is a {1}% chance it is not consumed! (Cap 12%)

rainbowclam.t: When using watering cans, there is a {1}% chance it is not consumed! (Cap 24%)

messengerpigeon.t: Every {1}m, grabs a random mutation from a random fruit in your garden and delivers it to another player's fruit! Ignores favorited fruit.

camel.t: Every {1}m, gathers 6.5 Prickly type fruit, forms a caravan with all other camels to travel around the map. Drops one package per fruit along its path. Collect packages for random rewards!

snowbunny.t: Every {1}m, eats a Carrot for {2}x sheckles value and grants all Bunnies in your garden {3} - {4} XP!

rainbowsnowbunny.t: Every {1}m, eats a Carrot for {2}x sheckles value and grants all Bunnies in your garden {3} - {4} XP!

frenchhen.t: Christmas type plants within {1} studs have {2}x increased size multiplier!

rainbowfrenchhen.t: Christmas type plants within {1} studs have {2}x increased size multiplier!

giftrat.t: Every {1}m, converts an apple into a random gift cosmetic! Collect all 6 variants!

christmasgorilla.t: Every {1}m, grabs fruits with Cold type mutations to reduce a random pot's cooking time by {2}s!

rainbowchristmasgorilla.t: Every {1}m, grabs fruits with Cold type mutations to reduce a random pot's cooking time by {2}s!

snowmanbuilder.t: Every {1}m, consumes Fruits with any Cold type mutations and grants a Snow-Fort based cosmetic reward!

giantsnowmanbuilder.t: Every {1}m, consumes Fruits with any Cold type mutations and grants a Snow-Fort based cosmetic reward!

arcticfox.t: Every {1}m, steals 24 random unique fruit from your garden and refreshes the seed shop! Ignores favorited fruit. Cannot be mimicked or refreshed.

rainbowarcticfox.t: Every {1}m, steals 24 random unique fruit from your garden and refreshes the seed shop! Ignores favorited fruit.

mistletoad.t: Every {1}m, croaks at the nearest plant, advancing growth by {2}m for each Christmas type pet in your garden, then all fruits on that plant will get the Chilled mutation!

penguin.t: Every {1}m, turns you into a belly sliding penguin for {2}s! Also belly slides to 4 random fruit within {3} studs and applies the Arctic mutation!

frostdragon.t:
Every {1}m, converts all Frozen mutation within {2} studs to Glacial mutation. For every mutation converted: {3} XP is added to all other pets in your garden. (Max 10,000 XP)
When selling Fruits with Glacial Mutation, {4}% chance a random mutation from that fruit will be applied to the fruits in your garden!

rainbowfrostdragon.t:
Every {1}m, converts all Frozen mutation within {2} studs to Glacial mutation. For every mutation converted: {3} XP is added to all other pets in your garden. (Max 10,000 XP)
When selling Fruits with Glacial Mutation, {4}% chance a random mutation from that fruit will be applied to the fruits in your garden!

krampus.t: Every {1}m, consumes a percentage of your sheckles to punish the nearest player to you!

rainbowkrampus.t: Every {1}m, consumes a percentage of your sheckles to punish the nearest player to you!

turtledove.t: Christmas plants within {1} studs have {2}x increased variant chance!

festiveturtledove.t: Christmas plants within {1} studs have {2}x increased variant chance!

reindeer.t:
Gains an additional {1} XP/s for every other Reindeer in your garden!
Every {2}m, has {3}% chance to apply the Snowy mutation to a nearby fruit!

festivereindeer.t:
Gains an additional {1} XP/s for every other Reindeer in your garden!
Every {2}m, has {3}% chance to apply the Snowy mutation to a nearby fruit!

pinebeetle.t: Every {1}m, initiates a battle with another player's Beetle. Pine Beetles can give a beetle reward exclusive to it.

cocoacat.t: Every {1}m, goes to a Hot Chocolate Mug cosmetic and naps near it for {2}s. New fruit within {3} studs will be {4}x larger.

eggnogchick.t:
Increases egg hatch speed by {1}%!
Every {2}m, has a {3}% chance to mutate a random fruit with the Eggnog mutation. Gains additional {4}% chance for every Egg in your garden.

nutcracker.t: Every {1}m, cracks open a random Nutty type fruit and grants a random Christmas related reward! Ignores favorited fruit.

festivenutcracker.t: Every {1}m, cracks open a random Nutty type fruit and grants a random Christmas related reward! Ignores favorited fruit.

yeti.t: Every {1}m, devours a fruit with at least 16 mutations to summon the Yeti Night weather! Ignores favorited fruit!

festiveyeti.t: Every {1}m, devours a fruit with at least 16 mutations to summon the Yeti Night weather! Ignores favorited fruit!

rednosedreindeer.t:
Every {1}m, grants {2} XP to a random non-Reindeer Pet in your garden for every Reindeer in your garden!
Every {3}m, mutates fruit up to the number of Reindeer in your garden with Ornamented mutation!

waterbuffalo.t: Every {1}m, harvests a crop and gives it to you! {2}% chance the crop stays when harvested.

icegolem.t: Grants a {1}% chance for the pet mutation acquired from Pet Mutation Machine to become one of four Ice Golem-exclusive mutations! (Cap 10%)

festiveicegolem.t: Grants a {1}% chance for the pet mutation acquired from Pet Mutation Machine to become one of four Ice Golem-exclusive mutations! (Cap 16%)

partridge.t: Grants Christmas plants within {1} studs a {2}x variant chance bonus!

festivepartridge.t: Grants Christmas plants within {1} studs a {2}x variant chance bonus!

festivesantabear.t: Every {1}m, spawns a gift randomly somewhere! Finding the Gift will grant Christmas related rewards.

santabear.t: Every {1}m, spawns a gift randomly somewhere! Finding the Gift will grant Christmas related rewards.

festivefrostsquirrel.t: Every {1}m, has a {2}% chance to apply the Subzero Mutation! (Cap 48%)

frostsquirrel.t: Every {1}m, has a {2}% chance to apply the Subzero Mutation! (Cap 24%)

moose.t:
When Christmas type pets finish their abilities, they start their cooldown with {1} seconds less!
Every {2}m, eats a fruit with a Cold type mutation and all nearby plants within {3} studs advance growth by {4}m! Ignores favorited fruit.

festivemoose.t:
When Christmas type pets finish their abilities, they start their cooldown with {1} seconds less!
Every {2}m, eats a fruit with a Cold type mutation and all nearby plants within {3} studs advance growth by {4}m! Ignores favorited fruit.

summerkiwi.t:
Every {1}m, {2}% chance a nearby fruit becomes Sandy or Snowy!
Every {3}s, goes to the egg with the highest hatch time, and reduces its hatch time by {4}s!
Increases egg hatch speed by {5}%!

festivewendigo.t: Loses 0.25% Hunger per second. At 30%+ Hunger, all other pets gain {1} XP/s. At 60%+ Hunger, all other pets stop losing Hunger. At 90%+ Hunger, both bonuses are active simultaneously.

wendigo.t: Loses 0.25% Hunger per second. At 30%+ Hunger, all other pets gain {1} XP/s. At 60%+ Hunger, all other pets stop losing Hunger. At 90%+ Hunger, both bonuses are active simultaneously.

angoragoat.t: Every {1}m, goes to a random player and rams them, knocking and launching them away!

newyearsbird.t: Every {1}m, flies around and launches fireworks everywhere to celebrate the new year!

rainbownewyearsbird.t: Every {1}m, flies around and launches fireworks everywhere to celebrate the new year!

flamebee.t:
Every {1}m, flies to a nearby fruit and pollinates it, applying Pollinated mutation!
Every {2}m, {3}% chance for a nearby fruit to become Burnt or Flaming!

calico.t: Every {1}s, naps for {2}s. New fruit within {3} studs will be {4}x larger and have a {5}% chance to be mutated with Sleepy mutation!

celebrationpuppy.t: Every {1}m, {2}% chance to dig up a random New Year cosmetic!

rainbowcelebrationpuppy.t: Every {1}m, {2}% chance to dig up a random New Year cosmetic!

celebrationbeetle.t: Every {1}m, initiates a battle with another player's Beetle. Champion Beetles can reward Beetle Medals which when used on a pet gains XP based on number of Beetle Trophies you have in your garden!

germanshepherd.t: Every {1}s, {2}% chance to dig up a random seed! The dug up seed has a {3}% chance to be a Gold seed instead!

galahcockatoo.t: Every {1}m, {2}% chance to mutate a nearby fruit, applying the Opulent mutation!

goblingardener.t: Every {1}m, goes to a random shop and steals an in-stock item and gives it to you! Rarer items have rarer chance to be stolen.

newyearschimp.t: Every {1}m, grabs a random crop from your garden and brings it to one of four places for different bonuses! (Ignores favorited)

rainbownewyearschimp.t: Every {1}m, grabs a random crop from your garden and brings it to one of four places for different bonuses! (Ignores favorited)

starwolf.t: Every {1}m, consumes the energy of 5 random moonlit fruits (Ignores favorited), howls and calls forth {2} - {3} shooting stars to fall on your garden which mutate fruits into Celestial!

rainbowstarwolf.t: Every {1}m, consumes the energy of 5 random moonlit fruits (Ignores favorited), howls and calls forth {2} - {3} shooting stars to fall on your garden which mutate fruits into Celestial!

windwyvern.t:
Every {1}m, converts all Windstruck mutation fruit within {2} studs to Gale mutation. For every mutation converted: {3}s cooldown is advanced for all other pets in your garden (Max 600s).
When selling Fruits with Gale Mutation, {4}% chance a random mutation from that fruit will be applied to the fruits in your garden!

bluewhale.t: Every {1}m, eats a fruit that is at least 60kg and summons the Whale Waters weather! Ignores favorited fruit.

giantscorpion.t: Every {1}m, stings a pet with the highest cooldown and refreshes its ability! There is a {2}% chance for the stung pet to get the Venom Pet Mutation!

newyearsdragon.t:
Every {1}m, breathes fireworks on 20-26 random fruits in your garden and mutates them with Firework mutation!
Every {2}m, consumes 100 fruit with the Firework mutation to give you the Dragon's Firework Gear!

rainbownewyearsdragon.t:
Every {1}m, breathes fireworks on 20-26 random fruits in your garden and mutates them with Firework mutation!
Every {2}m, consumes 100 fruit with the Firework mutation to give you the Dragon's Firework Gear!

performerseal.t: Every {1}m, plays ball with you. Each successful catch: a random plant grows by {2}s or a random pet gets {3} XP! (Max 15)

rainbowperformerseal.t: Every {1}m, plays ball with you. Each successful catch: a random plant grows by {2}s or a random pet gets {3} XP! (Max 15)

bearonbike.t: Every {1}m, goes to a random fruit in your garden and does a trick on it, applying the Whimsical mutation!

rainbowbearonbike.t: Every {1}m, goes to a random fruit in your garden and does a trick on it, applying the Whimsical mutation!

showpony.t: Every 30m on the clock, all your Ponies parade to a shop and may restock 1 random item per pony.

rainbowshowpony.t: Every 30m on the clock, all your Ponies parade to a shop and may restock 1 random item per pony.

carnivalelephant.t: When a pet finishes their ability: there is a {1}% chance the ability is activated again. You cannot have two pets of the same type for this passive to activate. (Cap 6%)

rainbowcarnivalelephant.t: When a pet finishes their ability: there is a {1}% chance the ability is activated again. You cannot have two pets of the same type for this passive to activate. (Cap 10%)

blackbird.t: Pets hatched from eggs have a bonus {1} - {2} age to their age value!

rainbowblackbird.t: Pets hatched from eggs have a bonus {1} - {2} age to their age value!

cuckoo.t: When you get a Lucky Harvest: There is a {1}% chance to get triple seeds! (stacked chance capped at 12%)

rainbowcuckoo.t: When you get a Lucky Harvest: There is a {1}% chance to get 4x seeds! (stacked chance capped at 12%)

birb.t: Every {1}m, can use its cuteness to hatch eggs faster. All eggs advance their hatch time by 150s! There's a 30% chance for the time advance to be multiplied by {2}x.

rainbowbirb.t: Every {1}m, can use its cuteness to hatch eggs faster. All eggs advance their hatch time by 300s! There's a 50% chance for the time advance to be multiplied by {2}x.

goldfinch.t: Every {1}m, has a {2}% chance to apply the Goldsparkle mutation to a nearby fruit!

rainbowgoldfinch.t: Every {1}m, has a {2}% chance to apply the Goldsparkle mutation to a nearby fruit!

pinkbunny.t: Every {1}s, eats a buttercup and drops two seeds!

rainbowpinkbunny.t: Every {1}s, eats a buttercup and drops three seeds!

redrosefox.t: Every {1}m, goes to another player's crop, mutates it with Cute then steals (Duplicates) it and gives it to you! Very rare chance to mutate with Heartbound mutation instead!

pinkpanda.t: Every {1}m, applies Heartstruck mutation to a random Bamboo!

chocolatebunny.t: Every {1}m, eats any Carrot plant with Choc mutation and spreads it to two other random fruits in your garden. Ignores favorited fruit.

gildedchocchocolatebunny.t: Every {1}m, eats any Carrot plant with Choc mutation and spreads it to two other random fruits in your garden. Ignores favorited fruit.

eastereggchick.t: Every {1}m, goes to a random un-hatched egg and reduces its hatch time by {2}s! Bonus {3}s for every other Easter Egg Chick in your garden!

gildedchoceastereggchick.t: Every {1}m, goes to a random un-hatched egg and reduces its hatch time by {2}s! Bonus {3}s for every other Easter Egg Chick in your garden!

orchidmantis.t: Every {1}m, prays for {2}s & each second a fruit within {3} studs has a {4}% chance to gain the Floral mutation. Fruit with Floral turn Gold, and Gold fruit with Floral convert to Rainbow!

stork.t: Every {1}m, grabs a random fruit from your garden and delivers it to another player's pet: to give {2} XP, or a Small Passive Boost! Ignores favorited fruit.

beaver.t: Every {1}m, goes to a Woody type fruit in your garden to convert it into a random wooden-based building cosmetic! Ignores favorited fruit.

lyrebird.t: Every {1}m, sings an empowering song, granting you the Song of Lyre buff for {2}s. While active, you have a {3}% chance to duplicate collected fruits and also get bonus {4}kg weight multiplier.

springbee.t:
Every {1}m, flies to a nearby fruit and pollinates it, applying Pollinated mutation!
Every {2}m, {3}% chance for a nearby fruit to get the Bloom mutation!

gildedchocspringbee.t:
Every {1}m, flies to a nearby fruit and pollinates it, applying Pollinated mutation!
Every {2}m, {3}% chance for a nearby fruit to get the Bloom mutation!

jerboa.t: Every {1}m, hops in place: gaining {2} XP and advances growth for a random plant in your garden by {3}m! The Jerboa has a {4}% chance to do it again each hop.

gildedchocjerboa.t: Every {1}m, hops in place: gaining {2} XP and advances growth for a random plant in your garden by {3}m! The Jerboa has a {4}% chance to do it again each hop.

candysquirrel.t: Every {1}m, has {2}% chance to apply the Candy mutation! (Cap 20%)

nyala.t: Every {1}m, eats fruit with at least 4 mutations (Ignores favorited). Fruits and pets within {2} studs get Bonuses: Fruits have a {3}% chance to get the Lush mutation & pets have a {3}% chance to gain {4} XP!

gildedchocnyala.t: Every {1}m, eats fruit with at least 4 mutations (Ignores favorited). Fruits and pets within {2} studs get Bonuses: Fruits have a {3}% chance to get the Lush mutation & pets have a chance to gain {4} XP!

peryton.t: Every {1}m, blesses all pets in your garden, granting {2} XP each! There is a {3}% chance for one of the blessed pet to get the Everchanted Pet Mutation!

gildedchocperyton.t: Every {1}m, blesses all pets in your garden, granting {2} XP each! There is a {3}% chance for one of the blessed pet to get the Everchanted Pet Mutation!

firemite.t: Every {1}m, stings a random pet and advances its ability cooldown by {2}s! Extra {3}s cooldown advanced for every other Firemite in your garden!

giantfiremite.t: Every {1}m, stings a random pet and advances its ability cooldown by {2}s! Extra {3}s cooldown advanced for every other Firemite in your garden!

ashraven.t: Every {1}m, consumes Fruits with Ash and/or Burnt mutation and grants an Ash-Castle based cosmetic reward! Ignores favorited fruit.

giantashraven.t: Every {1}m, consumes Fruits with Ash and/or Burnt mutation and grants an Ash-Castle based cosmetic reward! Ignores favorited fruit.

marshmallowlamb.t: Every {1}m, grants another pet in your garden either {2} XP OR advances its ability cooldown by {3}s! Marshmallow Lamb gains whichever bonus was not given.

gildedchocmarshmallowlamb.t: Every {1}m, grants another pet in your garden either {2} XP OR advances its ability cooldown by {3}s! Marshmallow Lamb gains whichever bonus was not given.

gummybear.t: Every {1}s, {2}% chance a nearby fruit gets the Gummy mutation!

hazehound.t:
Every {1}m, applies Ash mutation to a random fruit!
Every {2}m, applies Haze mutation to a random fruit!

rainbowhazehound.t:
Every {1}m, applies Ash mutation to a random fruit!
Every {2}m, applies Haze mutation to a random fruit!

hootsieroll.t:
All active Easter type pets gain an additional {1} XP/s!
All active pets gain an additional {2} XP/s!

easterbunny.t: Every {1}m, hides an Easter Egg reward in a random spot. Finding the Easter Egg grants great rewards/very positive effects!

gildedchoceasterbunny.t: Every {1}m, hides an Easter Egg reward in a random spot. Finding the Easter Egg grants great rewards/very positive effects!

cerberus.t:
Every {1}m, devours a fruit with Ash, Haze, Burnt & Flaming mutations, applying Smoldering mutation to another fruit, also has a {2}% chance to increase the level of pet in your garden.
When selling Fruits with Smoldering Mutation, {3}% chance a random mutation from that fruit will be applied to the fruits in your garden!

rainbowcerberus.t:
Every {1}m, devours a fruit with Ash, Haze, Burnt & Flaming mutations, applying Smoldering mutation to another fruit, also has a {2}% chance to increase the level of pet in your garden.
When selling Fruits with Smoldering Mutation, {3}% chance a random mutation from that fruit will be applied to the fruits in your garden!

ghostlydarkspriggan.t: Every {1}m, spreads its roots and the nearest {2} fruit within {3} studs have a {4}% to get the Blight or a rare chance for Necrotic mutation instead.

bloodhedgehog.t:
Grants prickly plants in {1} studs a {2}x size bonus!
Grants prickly plants in {3} studs a {4}x variant chance bonus!

ghostlyheadlesshorseman.t: Every {1}m, haunts a random level {2} pet without a mutation, resetting it to level 1 and bestowing one of four chaotic mutations: Dreadbound, Soulflame, or Spectral — with a rare {3}% chance for Nightmare!

rainbowparasaurolophus.t: Every {1}s, goes to the cosmetic crate with the highest open time, and reduces its open time by {2}s! There is a {3}% chance for open time reduction to be multiplied by {4}x.
